calls.notes: Deliberate artificial delay — leaf, do NOT port to Java target.
WHERE CatalogBrandId = brandId (if provided) AND CatalogTypeId = typeId (if provided). Used only for the COUNT query.
Counts all matching rows (no pagination) for pageCount calculation.
skip = pageIndex * pageSize. When take == 0, rewritten to int.MaxValue (returns all items).
Materialises the current page of CatalogItem rows.
AutoMapper leaf — maps CatalogItem entity to CatalogItemDto (Id, Name, Description, Price, PictureUri, CatalogTypeId, CatalogBrandId). Java port should use MapStruct or manual mapping.
Leaf — rewrites each item's relative PictureUri to an absolute URL. Called per item after AutoMapper mapping.
